parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, updated_id: $('Build PATCH Body').first().json.target_invoice_id, new_confidence: $('Build PATCH Body').first().json.new_confidence, reprocess_attempts: $('Build PATCH Body').first().json.patch_body.reprocess_attempts }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, skipped: true, reason: 'protected_or_no_drive_file_or_attempts_cap', target_invoice_id: $('Verify HMAC + Validate').first().json.target_invoice_id }) }}

secret_locations: Vercel env var (for /api/invoices/reprocess to sign requests)
_deployment_notes.drive_credential: REPLACE PLACEHOLDER_DRIVE_CRED_ID with actual n8n credential id (Google Drive OAuth2 d.vieco)
deploy_steps: 2. POST /activate with versionId (post-create draft→active publish per feedback_n8n_draft_active.md)
3. Smoke test: curl HMAC-signed POST with known target_invoice_id (confidence<0.5, has drive_file_id)
5. NEVER touch via PUT /api/v1/workflows (use /rest/ cookie session) per feedback_n8n_no_put_api.md
